final_draft: Your Slack and calendar updates can show up directly on your Northbridge board — no more checking three places for the same update. #Northbridge #Integrations

final_review.notes: This is a social post. It's concise, uses plain language, and directly echoes the brief's key message verbatim. No brand guide violations detected. Tone is practical and low-key as requested. Reading level is appropriate.
